title: Studio Calico Roundabout Kit | Sneak Peek
excerpt: Today I am sharing some fun sneak peeks at the layouts I made using Studio Calico's June scrapbook kit, Roundabout . I was especially in love with all the bright colors and travel-themed ephemera featured in this kit! I got…
body: Today I am sharing some fun sneak peeks at the layouts I made using Studio Calico's June scrapbook kit, Roundabout. I was especially in love with all the bright colors and travel-themed ephemera featured in this kit! I got all the scrapbook add-ons and also the Project Life kit. The box for that PL kit? Droolworthy. Roundabout will be available for purchase on May 27th at Studio Calico - you don't want to miss it!
